narrative:
Tipp City has 7,717 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
